title: Ruko 1661 Digger Toys, 2.4Ghz Excavator Toy, RC Excavator Truck Construction Toys Vehicles with Metal Shovel & Simulated Lights Remote Control Digger, Boy Toys, for Kids
features: 【Strengthened Alloy Bucket】Bucket and key parts are made of high-quality alloy material, which makes 1661 digger toys strong and durable, even when facing complicated digging tasks.

【11 Channels】1:18 scale rc excavator toys features 11 channels, it accurately simulates the operation of a real construction vehicle. From bucket digging to boom extension, let the kids exercise hand-eye coordination and logical thinking during play.

【Double Battery Life】Equipped with 2 high-performance rechargeable batteries to ensure 1661 remote control digger has long-lasting battery life, it's easy to change for long hours of play your remote control excavator without worry.
【Wide Angle Rotation &Light】1661 rc digger’s 680°rotation design allows for no-dead-angle operation and the cool LED lighting effect shines at night, adding fun to kids' outdoor exploration.

【2.4GHz Remote Control】Adopting advanced 2.4GHz, 1661 remote control cars for kids provides longer remote control distance and stronger anti-jamming ability, supports multiple simultaneous play and enjoying hours of uninterrupted fun.

【Conquer all Terrains】Thickened rubber tracks are wear-resistant and durable, suitable for a variety of terrains such as grass, mud and sand, allowing the rc car for kids to easily conquer any obstacle.

【Fantastic Gifts For Kids】Ruko 1661 remote control excavator combines the concept of edutainment and fun, allowing children to learn engineering knowledge in the control, and cultivate the spirit of exploration and hands-on ability, nice christmas gifts for kids.
